section.intent: Provide quick access to sections while maintaining the theme.
section.contentHints: Logo with a pumpkin icon, links to 'Attractions', 'Tickets', 'FAQ', and a 'Book Now' CTA with a glowing effect.

designPlan.goal: Orient users quickly and expose the highest-value paths
designPlan.roleFit: Optimize for the Visitor role seeking quick navigation to tickets
designPlan.taskLoopFocus: Help users enter the conversion loop via the 'Book Now' CTA
designPlan.capabilityFocus: Make the thematic immersion evident through gothic typography and glowing accents
designPlan.informationArchitecture: Primary anchor links (Attractions, Tickets, FAQ) and a high-contrast utility CTA
designPlan.layoutIntent: Sticky header with a semi-transparent dark blur background
designPlan.visualIntent: Gothic modern aesthetic with neon orange hover states
designPlan.interactionIntent: Smooth scroll to sections and subtle hover scaling on the CTA
designPlan.contentStrategy: Lead with a thematic logo, followed by clear navigation and a prominent action
constraints: Must maintain high contrast for accessibility on dark backgrounds
designPlan.rationale: A sticky, thematic nav ensures the conversion path is always one click away while reinforcing the mood.
